Description: Residual (specific/idiosyncratic) daily return for each Asia-region security from the UBER risk model, scaled as a fraction of 1 (e.g., 0.015 = +1.5%)
Daily specific (idiosyncratic) residual return from the UBER risk model for each US security; D1 (next-day) variant, values expressed in percentage terms (e.g., 1.5 means +1.5%)
